name: Arizer Extreme Q
summary: The patient classic. Whip + balloon, fan-assisted, the most affordable serious desktop in the UK.
description: The Extreme Q has been the patient go-to desktop for over a decade. Whip and balloon delivery, fan-assisted vapour, fully digital temperature. Cheaper than every alternative in its class. If you medicate at home and want a desktop that works without the Volcano price, this is it.
